title: Orchidotypus hispidulus
taxonomy: Orchidotypus hispidulus belongs to the family Anthribidae, which is a group of weevils. This weevil is further classified as a member of the subfamily Anthribinae. Within the subfamily, it is categorized as a genus and then a species, with Orchidotypus being the genus and hispidulus being the species. At the order level, it falls under Coleoptera, which is a diverse group of beetles. This classification highlights the weevil's place within the broader insect taxonomy.
